TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kanakanavu, story: kkvNr_dailylife_Angai
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: masiin 'esi kamanʉngaku ia.
S.PHON: masiin ʔesi kamanɨŋaku ia.
S.FORM: masiin 'esi kamanʉngaku ia.
S.PHON: masiin ʔesi kamanɨŋaku ia.
S.TRANSL: 現在我所做的是……
What I am doing now is...

S.FORM: ʉnco nimʉka nimʉkaku ia er 'una sua saviki er umi er kanavunavu.
S.PHON: ɨnʦo nimɨka nimɨkaku ia er~ɾ ʔuna sua saviki er~ɾ umi er~ɾ kanavunavu.
S.FORM: ʉnco nimʉka nimʉkaku ia er 'una sua saviki er umi er kanavunavu.
S.PHON: ɨnʦo nimɨka nimɨkaku ia er~ɾ ʔuna sua saviki er~ɾ umi er~ɾ kanavunavu.
S.TRANSL: 我所種植的有檳榔、梅子和麻竹.
What I have grown includes betel nuts, plums, and Ma Bamboo.

S.FORM: 'una nimʉkaku masiin.
S.PHON: ʔuna nimɨkaku masiin.
S.FORM: 'una nimʉkaku masiin.
S.PHON: ʔuna nimɨkaku masiin.
S.TRANSL: 我現在有種植XX.
What I have grown now is XX.

S.FORM: er u masiin sua umi ia acecu nipu'a.
S.PHON: er~ɾ u masiin sua umi ia aʦeʦu nipuʔa.
S.FORM: er u masiin sua umi ia acecu nipu'a.
S.PHON: er~ɾ u masiin sua umi ia aʦeʦu nipuʔa.
S.TRANSL: 現在梅子已經賣掉了.
Now the plums have already been sold.

S.FORM: 'acecu nipu'a kan manasʉ er manasʉ urucin nʉmʉna cukue er poti.
S.PHON: ʔaʦeʦu nipuʔa kan manasɨ er~ɾ manasɨ ur~ɾuʦin nɨmɨna ʦukue er~ɾ poti.
S.FORM: 'acecu nipu'a kan manasʉ er manasʉ urucin nʉmʉna cukue er poti.
S.PHON: ʔaʦeʦu nipuʔa kan manasɨ er~ɾ manasɨ ur~ɾuʦin nɨmɨna ʦukue er~ɾ poti.

TRANSL.notes: (梅子)已經賣掉了,或許有兩捆麻袋(那麼多).

S.TRANSL: 已經賣掉了,或許有兩捆麻袋 .

TRANSL.notes: (The plums), perhaps (as many as) two bundles of gunny, have already been sold.

S.TRANSL: , perhaps two bundles of gunny, have already been sold.

S.FORM: sua maku.
S.PHON: sua maku.
S.FORM: sua maku.
S.PHON: sua maku.

S.FORM: er masiin ia 'akiacu 'esi kamanʉnga masiin sii acecu nipu'a kangvang sua er mamiriki er umi er.
S.PHON: er~ɾ masiin ia ʔakiaʦu ʔesi kamanɨŋa masiin sii aʦeʦu nipuʔa kaŋvaŋ sua er~ɾ mamir~ɾiki er~ɾ umi er~ɾ.
S.FORM: er masiin ia 'akiacu 'esi kamanʉnga masiin sii acecu nipu'a kangvang sua er mamiriki er umi er.
S.PHON: er~ɾ masiin ia ʔakiaʦu ʔesi kamanɨŋa masiin sii aʦeʦu nipuʔa kaŋvaŋ sua er~ɾ mamir~ɾiki er~ɾ umi er~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 現在我已經沒有事做了,因為李子和梅子全都被賣掉了.
Now I already have nothing to do, because all of the plums have been sold.

S.FORM: tecu tecikia tia kamanʉnga masiin ia tecikia er er pocu'u kanavunavu.
S.PHON: teʦu teʦikia tia kamanɨŋa masiin ia teʦikia er~ɾ er~ɾ poʦuʔu kanavunavu.
S.FORM: tecu tecikia tia kamanʉnga masiin ia tecikia er er pocu'u kanavunavu.
S.PHON: teʦu teʦikia tia kamanɨŋa masiin ia teʦikia er~ɾ er~ɾ poʦuʔu kanavunavu.
S.TRANSL: 我現在要做的事是整理麻竹.
What I want to do now is clean Ma Bamboo.

S.FORM: er pocuin kanavunavu ia manasʉ matarava sua tecu aru vuanʉ ia tecikia pocuvu'u.
S.PHON: er~ɾ poʦuin kanavunavu ia manasɨ matar~ɾava sua teʦu ar~ɾu vuanɨ ia teʦikia poʦuvuʔu.
S.FORM: er pocuin kanavunavu ia manasʉ matarava sua tecu aru vuanʉ ia tecikia pocuvu'u.
S.PHON: er~ɾ poʦuin kanavunavu ia manasɨ matar~ɾava sua teʦu ar~ɾu vuanɨ ia teʦikia poʦuvuʔu.
S.TRANSL: 整理麻竹的話,可能到八月.

TRANSL.notes: If (we want to) clean Ma Bamboo, perhaps (the activity) would last until August.

S.TRANSL: If clean Ma Bamboo, perhaps would last until August.

S.FORM: er masuaci ia kan tia tekarikia.
S.PHON: er~ɾ masuaʦi ia kan tia tekar~ɾikia.
S.FORM: er masuaci ia kan tia tekarikia.
S.PHON: er~ɾ masuaʦi ia kan tia tekar~ɾikia.
S.TRANSL: 那樣之後,要如何,我要如何?

TRANSL.notes: Being in that way, how should (I) do, how should I do?

S.TRANSL: Being in that way, how should do, how should I do?

S.FORM: tavarʉ'ʉ pocuvu'u 'aan marangcikia.
S.PHON: tavar~ɾɨʔɨ poʦuvuʔu ʔaan mar~ɾaŋʦikia.
S.FORM: tavarʉ'ʉ pocuvu'u 'aan marangcikia.
S.PHON: tavar~ɾɨʔɨ poʦuvuʔu ʔaan mar~ɾaŋʦikia.
S.TRANSL: 可以採竹筍嗎?不可以嗎?我老了.

TRANSL.notes: (Am I) able to pluck the bamboo? No? I am old.

S.TRANSL: able to pluck the bamboo? No? I am old.

S.FORM: L2MjiuhaoleL2M.
S.PHON: **mjiuhao*e**m.
S.FORM: L2MjiuhaoleL2M.
S.PHON: **mjiuhao*e**m.
S.TRANSL: 就好了.
It is finished.
